procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1070.004

sigma.title: ADS Zone.Identifier Deleted By Uncommon Application

osquery.name: t1070_004_file_del
osquery.query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE action = 'DELETE' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

executions.reason: Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 25 direct run(s), 1/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
